ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feature */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the feature (0 being the highest) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., Done, In Progress, Not Started) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the feature */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the feature */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the feature */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is developed externally */,
  "external_vendor" TEXT /* Name of the external vendor if the feature is developed externally */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the feature */,
  "spent" TEXT /* Amount spent on the feature so far */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level (0 being the highest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "source_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature that depends on another feature */,
  "target_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being depended on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Hard, Soft) */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., Met, Not Met) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_source_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_target_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., Done, In Progress, Not Started) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the step was last updated */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the step */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the step */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the step */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_steps_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_steps_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_steps_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for replies) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES feature_comments ("comment_id")
)
